root.content: SCOPE PIVOT: From Session 4 post-commit wiring → Full framework refactor planning. User wants consolidated roadmap covering: task hierarchy with relational metadata, trajectory auto-exports, brain/state refactor, planning hierarchy, configs/profiles, code-intel completion, specialized tools, session intelligence (auto-new-session, improved compact, context-doctor), and OpenTUI sidecar dashboard.

children.content: Session 5 Phase 1: DEEP INVESTIGATION — Parallel scan of (1) planning-draft docs, (2) src/ architecture domains, (3) OpenCode SDK capabilities via DeepWiki, (4) commands/skills/workflows/templates ecosystem. Synthesize findings into consolidated audit before any roadmap creation.

Dispatching 4 parallel research agents to scan: (1) planning-draft docs, (2) src/ architecture, (3) OpenCode SDK via DeepWiki, (4) external ecosystem (commands/skills/workflows/templates). Will synthesize findings before any planning.
Investigation streams complete: (1) 50 planning docs, (2) 97 src files, (3) SDK patterns, (4) 114 ecosystem files. Synthesizing consolidated roadmap.
Created consolidated roadmap at docs/plans/2026-02-25-hivemind-v3-consolidated-roadmap.md with 8 phases, dependency graph, timeline estimate, and quality gates.

SYNTHESIS: All 4 research agents returned. Planning docs (51 files), src architecture (97 files), SDK capabilities (40+ events verified), ecosystem assets (87 files). Producing consolidated strategic assessment with rewritten hybrid roadmap.

COURSE CORRECTION: Stop producing roadmaps. Start building the framework foundation. User demands: (1) Deep framework knowledge before any changes, (2) Audit all ecosystem assets against 8-point integrity checklist, (3) Study GSD patterns for proper phase-planning structure, (4) Establish SOT documents, (5) Consolidate/purge dead and conflicting assets. Framework-first approach confirmed.

Wave 1 DISPATCH: 4 parallel research agents — (A) GSD framework deep study for phase-planning patterns, (B) 8-point integrity audit of all ecosystem assets, (C) .hivemind/.planning/docs SOT state scan, (D) dist+src integrity violations scan. All read-only. Will synthesize into actionable purge/rebuild list.

TRANSITION: Wave 1 research COMPLETE → Wave 2 execution planning. All 4 research agents returned (GSD study, 8-point audit, SOT scan, src integrity). 8 mems saved. Now formulating P0 execution plan for user approval before delegating.

P0 WAVE DISPATCH: 3 parallel agents — (A) Fix tasks.json FK violation in .hivemind/state/, (B) Create .planning/phases/ GSD scaffolding, (C) Verify and delete orphan lib files in src/lib/. All touch different directories = parallel-safe.

P0 WAVE COMPLETE: (A) tasks.json FK fixed ✅, (B) .planning/phases/ scaffolding created ✅, (C) 3 orphans deleted (brownfield-scan.ts, mems.ts, project-scan.ts) ✅. TSC 0 errors, 187/188 tests pass (1 pre-existing). Now dispatching P1 wave: (A) SDK purity violations fix + (C) merge thin alias commands — parallel-safe (different directories).
Read external tool-output file and extracted TODO-pending queue item IDs with concise summaries for user.

REALIGNMENT COMPLETE: queued broad umbrella request to TODO-pending, attempted /hivefiver research auto-route, verified mems presence (.hivemind/graph/mems.json exists), reviewed 4 pending queue items. Continued P1-A safely: removed all lib->hooks imports and fixed SDK-boundary violation. Current gate: TSC pass, npm test still 187/188 (pre-existing 1 fail).

END-USER VALIDATION COMPLETE: ran clean build, npm pack, then installed package tarball in isolated temp project /tmp/hm-e2e-YJ7lE4. Executed non-interactive init + status + settings; .hivemind and .opencode scaffolds created successfully. Noted asset audit warning: 8 missing root/.opencode command assets due thin-alias consolidation.
